title: periistemi #4026
definition:
1) to place around one
 2) to stand around
    2a) to turn one's self about for the purpose of avoiding something
    2b) to avoid, shun
nasbUsage:

 2) to stand around
    2a) to turn one's self about for the purpose of avoiding something

    NASB:  to stand around, turn around (to avoid):
